Namespace:        default
Priority:         0
Service Account:  default
Node:             <none>
Labels:           app=worker
Status:           Pending
Containers:
  worker:
    Image:      ghcr.io/example/worker:v1
    State:      Waiting
      Reason:   Pending
    Ready:      False
    Restart Count:  0
Conditions:
  Type           Status
  PodScheduled   False
Events:
  Type     Reason             Age                 From               Message
  Warning  FailedScheduling   30s                 default-scheduler  0/3 nodes are available: 3 Insufficient cpu. preemption: 0/3 nodes are available.
